plan_type_rationale: Multi-phase feature touching semantic enrichment layer + scanner integration + public API sync. Requires discovery + validation gates.

phases.name: AST Extraction Foundation
phases.description: Implement AST-based extraction of exports and used_by relationships from source code.

tasks.name: Create AST extractor module
tasks.description: Implement src/semantic/ast-extractor.ts with support for JS/TS exports and imports
acceptance_criteria: Handles CommonJS and ES6 module formats

tasks.name: Add CLI flag for semantic generation

phases.name: Semantic Header Generation
phases.description: Implement semantic header generation and integration with populate tool.

tasks.name: Implement header generator
tasks.description: Create src/semantic/header-generator.ts to generate CodeRef-Semantics comments

tasks.name: Integrate with populate flow
tasks.description: Wire header generation into src/populate.ts main flow
acceptance_criteria: Populate tool invokes header generation when --semantic flag set
Written headers appear in source files
No regression in existing populate functionality

phases.name: LLM Enrichment (Optional)
phases.description: Implement optional LLM-enriched rules/related field generation.

tasks.name: Create LLM enricher module
tasks.description: Implement src/semantic/llm-enricher.ts for rules and related field generation
acceptance_criteria: Implements exponential backoff for rate limits

tasks.name: Wire LLM enrichment to populate
tasks.description: Integrate llm-enricher into populate flow when --llm-enrich flag set

phases.name: Registry Sync and Refresh
phases.description: Implement unified-registry.json synchronization and refresh command.

tasks.name: Implement registry sync
tasks.description: Create sync function to update unified-registry.json with extracted semantic data
acceptance_criteria: Reads semantic headers from source files
Validates against registry schema before writes

tasks.name: Implement refresh command
tasks.description: Add refresh subcommand to CLI for ongoing syncs

phases.name: Integration Testing and Validation
phases.description: End-to-end testing and integration with coderef-scan pipeline.

tasks.name: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Create test suite covering full semantic workflow
acceptance_criteria: E2E test: populate --semantic on sample project

tasks.name: Validate scanner integration
tasks.description: Verify coderef-scan reads and uses semantic headers correctly
acceptance_criteria: coderef-scan outputs semantic fields when present
No regression in existing scanner functionality

hard_stops.gate: AST extractor module tests pass and performance baseline met
Populate integration verified; no regression in existing functionality
Registry sync validates schema; refresh command functional
Integration tests pass; scanner integration validated
